chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: If you are writing a simple Python program

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: Then you will be able to use F.write and F.read

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: But we are talking about things that you may need to do

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: For example, suppose you want to edit the sixth character of a file

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: So you won't be able to read the entire file

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: And then you won't be able to change the sixth character and write it again

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: This won't be an efficient operation

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: We can use F.seek

chunks.text: So you can see here in Python, the seek and tell functions are used to work

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions

chunks.title: seek(), tell() and other functions
chunks.text: So these functions are part of built-in IOModule which provides

entire file And then you won't be able to change the sixth character and write it again This won't be an efficient operation We can use F.seek So you can see here in Python, the seek and tell
